sources.excerpt: Asian Grill, 6228 Rolling Rd # A, Springfield, VA 22152. The live Dinner menu directly names ingredients including fish, shrimp, scallops, cashews, sesame, egg, and peanut dipping sauce, and includes a gluten-free category; it does not publish a comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredients, allergen legend, or cross-contact statement.
